players.name: Bree Hall
players.injury_comment: Hall will sit out Monday's meeting with Washington to preserve her eligibility while signed to a developmental contract. Her next opportunity to play will come Thursday against the Sky.

players.name: Justine Pissott
players.injury_comment: The Fever are preserving Jackson's eligibility under a development contract. Her next chance to play comes Thursday against the Sky.

home.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Kiki Iriafen
players.injury_comment: Iriafen landed awkwardly on her right leg in the second quarter before exiting to the locker room, and she won't return during the second half. The second-year forward can be considered questionable ahead of Friday's game against the Tempo. With Iriafen unavailable for the remainder of Monday's contest, Cotie McMahon and Angela Dugalic are candidates to help pick up the slack.
